prior.content_md:
**MONITORING — Review incoming client data requests against GRI 308 and GRI 414 scope**

Freight forwarders in supplier positions to GRI-reporting clients face data requests under GRI 308 (Supplier Environmental Assessment) without advance notice. Clients in the luxury goods, high-value automotive, and film and TV verticals — all sectors with significant ESG reporting exposure — may be among those transmitting such requests. Action: designate a single internal owner for sustainability data requests; document current emissions data availability by mode (air, road, ocean) so responses to client requests can be dispatched without delay.
*Cause: GRI 308 requires reporting organisations to assess environmental impacts within their supply chains. Mechanical consequence: tier-1 suppliers, including freight forwarders, receive assessment questionnaires or contractual representations requests. Effect on workspace: air-primary freight operations generate the highest per-unit emissions intensity; this is the vertical where client scrutiny is highest and data gaps most commercially exposed.*
*Source: GRI Standards English Language listing (GRI 308 confirmed published), Global Reporting Initiative. https://www.globalreporting.org/how-to-use-the-gri-standards/gri-standards-english-language/*

**MONITORING — Track GRI 102: Climate Change 2025 and GRI 103: Energy 2025 for disclosure requirements relevant to transport-intensive operations**

GRI 102: Climate Change 2025 and GRI 103: Energy 2025 were both published 26 June 2025, representing the most recent updates to the standards most directly relevant to freight operations. The full text of these standards was not retrieved in this run. **Research gap: the specific disclosure requirements introduced or revised in GRI 102: 2025 and GRI 103: 2025 relative to prior versions are not confirmed from the available source content.** Action: obtain and review the full text of GRI 102: 2025 and GRI 103: 2025 from the GRI standards download page before next reporting cycle or next major client RFP response.
*Source: GRI Standards English Language listing, Global Reporting Initiative, 26 Jun 2025 update. https://www.globalreporting.org/how-to-use-the-gri-standards/gri-standards-english-language/*
